examples: Hawke got up and walked obtrusively out of the building.
I am shuddering at the idea of how this might be handled if you wrote it obtrusively.
Less obtrusively, other groups are carving out markets for themselves.
No nurse had been in for hours, and the last to come in had lain down upon the clover-covered floor and giggled obtrusively until some thoughtful faerie had put an egg in her mouth to shut her up.
